# bankruptcyhardship.org

> Guide to the undue hardship standard in bankruptcy -- student loans and hardship discharges.

bankruptcyhardship.org is a free, open-source educational resource about hardship provisions in bankruptcy. Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network.

## Pages

- https://bankruptcyhardship.org/: Guide to undue hardship in bankruptcy -- student loans, hardship discharges

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
